title: CB Split Outlet Under Press
description: You are the central centre-back receiving from the goalkeeper under a central press. Split to keep a safe exit lane open.
teaching_point: Split early across the press shadow so the goalkeeper has a clean first pass.

feedback_hints.success: You split into a clear outlet lane and helped secure first phase build-out.
feedback_hints.common_error: You stayed too central behind the presser, so the passing lane remained blocked.
feedback_hints.alternate_valid: This angle still gave a usable escape option even if not the best lane.
feedback_hints.teaching_emphasis: Move before the pass arrives so your body shape faces both sides.
success_points: You moved outside the direct press shadow before receiving.
Your position gave the goalkeeper a clear diagonal lane.
error_points: Staying flat made it easy for one presser to block both you and the lane.
Your receiving angle did not open a second option after the first touch.
alternate_points: The lane was playable, but a wider split would create more time on the ball.
